name: Anti
raw_text: [ANTI-X Y+]. Each time an attack is made with this weapon against a unit that has the keyword X, an unmodified wound roll of Y+ scores a critical wound.

name: Assault
raw_text: A unit that contains one or more models equipped with an [ASSAULT] weapon can shoot with such weapons even in a turn in which it Advanced (using assault shooting).

name: Blast
raw_text: [BLAST]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, add one additional attack die for every five models that were in the target unit when you selected targets (rounding down). [BLAST] weapons can never target a unit that is within engagement range of the bearer's unit.

name: Cleave
raw_text: [CLEAVE X]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, if you selected only one target for all of that weapon's attacks, add X additional attack dice for every five models that were in the target unit when you selected targets (rounding down).

name: Close-quarters
raw_text: A unit containing one or more models with a [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapon can shoot with those weapons even while within engagement range (close-quarters shooting). When shooting using another type, each model in the unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE models) must choose to make attacks with either its [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapons or its other ranged weapons — not both. [PISTOL] is identical to [CLOSE-QUARTERS] for all rules purposes.

name: Command Re-roll
when: Any phase, just after you make an Advance, Charge, Hit, Wound, Damage, Save or Hazardous roll, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon, for a friendly unit.
effect: Re-roll that roll. If several dice were rolled together, re-roll one of them (a Charge roll must be re-rolled in full).

name: Counter-offensive
when: Fight step of your opponent's Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
target: One friendly unit eligible to fight.
effect: Until the end of the phase your unit has the Fights First ability, and it must be the next unit you select to fight.

name: Crushing Impact
when: Your Charge phase, just after a friendly MONSTER or VEHICLE unit ends a Charge move.
effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit and one of your models engaged with it, then roll a number of D6 equal to that model's Toughness: for each 1 your unit suffers 1 mortal wound, and for each 5+ the enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds per unit).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deadly Demise
raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

name: Deep Strike
raw_text: If every model in this unit has Deep Strike, then each time it makes an ingress move (arrives from Reserves), it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units — even within your opponent's deployment zone.

name: Devastating Wounds
raw_text: Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical wound (an unmodified wound roll of 6), the attack sequence ends and the target suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the weapon's Damage characteristic instead of its normal damage. These mortal wounds can destroy at most one model per critical wound; any excess is lost.

name: Epic Challenge
when: Fight phase, just after a friendly CHARACTER unit is selected to fight.
effect: Select one CHARACTER model in your unit; until the end of the phase, that model's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

name: Explosives
target: One friendly unengaged EXPLOSIVES/GRENADES unit that is eligible to shoot and did not Advance this turn.
effect: Select one EXPLOSIVES/GRENADES model in your unit and one unengaged enemy unit within 8" of and visible to it, then roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

name: Extra Attacks
raw_text: When the bearer fights, it makes attacks with an [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapon in addition to its other melee weapons. In the Select Weapons step you select all of the model's [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapons and one of its other melee weapons; [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapons cannot themselves be selected as that "other" weapon.

name: Feel No Pain
raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

name: Feel No Pain
raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

name: Feel No Pain
raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

name: Feel No Pain
raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

name: Feel No Pain
raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

name: Fights First
raw_text: While every model in this unit has this ability, the unit is a Fights First unit: in the Fight phase, Fights First units are selected to fight before units that do not have this ability.

name: Fire Overwatch
when: End of your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or finishes a move.
target: One friendly unengaged unit (excluding TITANIC units).
effect: Your unit shoots the enemy unit using snap shooting — it can only target that one visible enemy unit within 24", each attack hits only on an unmodified 6, and hit rolls cannot be re-rolled. After shooting, the unit is not eligible to start an action this turn.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Firing Deck
raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

name: Hazardous
raw_text: After a unit shoots or fights with one or more [HAZARDOUS] weapons, make one Hazardous test (roll one D6) for each such weapon that was selected: on a 1, the bearer is destroyed — or, if it is a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE, it instead suffers 3 mortal wounds.

name: Heavy
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time an attack is made with this weapon, add 1 to the hit roll if all of the following apply to the attacking unit: it is unengaged; it was not set up on the battlefield this turn; and no model in it has moved more than 3" this turn.

name: Heroic Intervention
when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
target: One friendly unengaged unit within 12" of one or more enemy units (a VEHICLE only if it is a CHARACTER or WALKER unit).
effect: Resolve a charge with your unit, selecting an enemy unit that made a Charge move this phase and is within range.

name: Hover
raw_text: Each time this unit takes to the skies, do not subtract 2" from the maximum distance it can move — letting it hover and skim over the battlefield instead of leaving the table.

name: Ignores Cover
raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, the target cannot have the benefit of cover against that attack.

name: Indirect Fire
raw_text: A unit with one or more [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons can shoot them at a target unit even if no models in the target are visible to the firing models. Each time such a weapon attacks a unit that none of the firing models can see, the target has the benefit of cover and the attack suffers -1 to the hit roll.

name: Infiltrators
raw_text: During deployment, if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from your opponent's deployment zone and from all enemy units.

name: Insane Bravery
when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test for a friendly unit.
effect: That Battle-shock test is automatically passed.
restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

name: Lance
raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the bearer's unit made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the wound roll.

name: Leader
raw_text: This unit is a Leader. During the Declare Battle Formations step it can be attached to one of the Bodyguard units listed on its datasheet to form a single Attached unit. See Attached Units.

name: Lethal Hits
raw_text: Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical hit (an unmodified hit roll of 6), you can choose for that attack to automatically wound the target — no wound roll is made (so that attack cannot then score a critical wound).

name: Lone Operative
raw_text: Unless this unit is part of an Attached unit, enemy models can only target it with a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12" of it, and it cannot be targeted by [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons unless the attacking model is within 12". If the ability is written Lone Operative X", use X" in place of 12".

name: Melta
raw_text: [MELTA X]. Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target unit was within half range of the weapon in the Select Targets step, add X to that weapon's Damage characteristic for that attack.

name: One Shot
raw_text: A weapon with this ability can be selected to make attacks with only once per battle.

name: Pistol
raw_text: [PISTOL] and [CLOSE-QUARTERS] are identical for all rules purposes: a model can make attacks with its pistols while its unit is within engagement range of enemy units, but if it does it can target only an enemy unit it is engaged with, and can make attacks only with its pistols.

name: Precision
raw_text: While resolving attacks made with this weapon against a unit that contains an attached CHARACTER, if a CHARACTER model in the target unit is visible to the attacker, the attacking player can choose to allocate the attack to that CHARACTER model.

name: Psychic
raw_text: Attacks made with a [PSYCHIC] weapon are psychic attacks. Each time such an attack is made, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the attacking model's Ballistic/Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the hit roll.

name: Rapid Fire
raw_text: [RAPID FIRE X]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, add X additional attack dice if the target unit was within half range of the weapon in the Select Targets step.

name: Rapid Ingress
when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
target: One friendly unit in Reserves (excluding AIRCRAFT).
effect: Your unit makes an ingress move (arrives from Reserves) now.
restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first battle round.

name: Scouts
raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

name: Scouts
raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

name: Scouts
raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

name: Scouts
raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

name: Scouts
raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

name: Smokescreen
when: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase.
effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your SMOKE unit — or a unit that is not fully visible to the attacker because of your SMOKE unit — the target has the benefit of cover against that attack.

name: Stealth
raw_text: If every model in this unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack targets the unit, that unit has the benefit of cover against the attack.

name: Super-Heavy Walker
raw_text: Each time a unit with this ability makes a normal, advance or fall-back move, its models can move through other models (excluding TITANIC models) and horizontally through terrain features 4" or less in height. Before moving, you can give all models in the unit the MOBILE keyword until the move ends; if you do, roll one D6 when the move ends — on a 1, the unit is battle-shocked.

name: Support
raw_text: This is a support unit. Like a Leader, during the Declare Battle Formations step it can be attached to a Bodyguard unit to form a single Attached unit. See Attached Units.

name: Sustained Hits
raw_text: [SUSTAINED HITS X]. Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical hit (an unmodified hit roll of 6), that attack scores X additional hits on the target.

name: Torrent
raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, that attack automatically hits the target (no hit roll is made).

name: Twin-linked
raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, you can re-roll the wound roll.
